metadata.name: spl_token_forwarder
metadata.description: SPL Token forwarder for wrap/unwrap operations with Ed25519 signature verification

instructions.name: close_config
docs: Close the forwarder config PDA, recovering rent to the authority.
Call LAST, after closing all escrows and nonce bitmaps.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Emergency committee — receives rent from closed config.

instructions.name: close_escrow
docs: Close the escrow for a specific token mint, draining tokens first.
Transfers ALL remaining tokens to the recipient, then closes the
escrow token account. Rent lamports are recovered to the authority.
The drain is automatic: if the escrow holds tokens, they are
transferred out before the account is closed.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Emergency committee — receives rent lamports from closed escrow ATA.

accounts.name: escrow_ata
docs: The escrow token account to drain and close.

accounts.name: escrow_pda
docs: The escrow PDA authority over the escrow ATA.

accounts.name: recipient_ata
docs: Recipient token account for drained tokens.

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: The token mint for this escrow.
ensures the correct mint is provided.

instructions.name: close_nonce_bitmaps_batch
docs: Close nonce bitmap PDAs in a batch, recovering rent to the authority.
Bitmap PDAs are passed as remaining_accounts.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Emergency committee — receives rent from closed bitmaps.

instructions.name: forward_call
docs: Forward a wrap or unwrap call from the Protocol Adapter.
Note: Unlike EVM which doesn't check stopped state here (trusting PA won't call if stopped),
we also don't check here. The PA is responsible for not calling forwarders when stopped.
This matches the EVM ForwarderBase.forwardCall() pattern exactly.

accounts.name: ix_sysvar
docs: Instructions sysvar for CPI caller verification and Ed25519 signature introspection.

accounts.name: clock
docs: Clock sysvar for deadline checking

instructions.name: forward_emergency_call
docs: Forward an emergency call when PA is stopped.
Mirrors EVM's forwardEmergencyCall() which checks _checkEmergencyStopped()
by querying ProtocolAdapter.isEmergencyStopped().

accounts.name: pa_state
docs: Protocol Adapter state account for checking paused status.
Mirrors EVM's _checkEmergencyStopped() which queries ProtocolAdapter.isEmergencyStopped().

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initialize the forwarder config with emergency committee.
Mirrors EVM constructor validation:
- protocol_adapter must not be zero
- logic_ref must not be all zeros
- emergency_committee must not be zero

instructions.name: set_emergency_caller
docs: Set the emergency caller (one-time, by emergency committee when PA is stopped).
Mirrors EVM's setEmergencyCaller() which checks _checkEmergencyStopped()
by querying ProtocolAdapter.isEmergencyStopped().

accounts.name: pa_state
docs: Protocol Adapter state account for checking paused status.
Mirrors EVM's _checkEmergencyStopped() which queries ProtocolAdapter.isEmergencyStopped().

errors.name: InvalidInput
errors.msg: Invalid input data - check logs for expected vs actual length

errors.name: InvalidWrapInputLength
errors.msg: Invalid wrap input length - expected 185 bytes

errors.name: InvalidUnwrapInputLength
errors.msg: Invalid unwrap input length - expected 72 bytes

errors.name: InvalidEmergencyInputLength
errors.msg: Invalid emergency withdraw input length - expected 72 bytes

errors.name: InvalidTokenAccountData
errors.msg: Invalid token account data - too short or malformed

errors.name: InsufficientRemainingAccounts
errors.msg: Insufficient remaining accounts - check logs for expected count

errors.name: InvalidTokenProgram
errors.msg: Invalid token program - expected SPL Token program ID

errors.name: TokenMintMismatch
errors.msg: Token mint mismatch - provided mint doesn't match input

errors.name: UnknownOperation
errors.msg: Unknown operation code

errors.name: UnauthorizedCaller
errors.msg: Unauthorized caller - only Protocol Adapter can call forward_call

errors.name: UnauthorizedLogicRef
errors.msg: Unauthorized logic_ref - this forwarder doesn't handle this resource type

errors.name: DeadlineExpired
errors.msg: Signature deadline has expired

errors.name: NonceAlreadyUsed
errors.msg: Nonce has already been used (replay attack prevented)

errors.name: InvalidSignature
errors.msg: Ed25519 signature verification failed

errors.name: Ed25519InstructionNotFound
errors.msg: Ed25519 instruction not found at specified index

errors.name: InvalidEd25519Instruction
errors.msg: Invalid Ed25519 instruction format

errors.name: Ed25519PubkeyMismatch
errors.msg: Ed25519 public key mismatch

errors.name: Ed25519MessageMismatch
errors.msg: Ed25519 message mismatch

errors.name: InsufficientEscrowBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient escrow balance for unwrap

errors.name: EmergencyCallerAlreadySet
errors.msg: Emergency caller already set

errors.name: EmergencyCallerNotSet
errors.msg: Emergency caller not set

errors.name: ProtocolAdapterNotStopped
errors.msg: Protocol Adapter not stopped - cannot perform emergency operations

errors.name: InvalidPaState
errors.msg: Invalid PA state account - does not match derived PDA from protocol_adapter

errors.name: ZeroAddressNotAllowed
errors.msg: Zero address not allowed

errors.name: AccountNotFound
errors.msg: Account not found in remaining accounts

errors.name: InvalidAccountOwner
errors.msg: Invalid account owner

errors.name: InvalidEscrowPda
errors.msg: Invalid escrow PDA

errors.name: InvalidNonceBitmapPda
errors.msg: Invalid nonce bitmap PDA - doesn't match derived address

errors.name: TokenTransferFailed
errors.msg: Token transfer failed - ensure user has approved escrow PDA as delegate with sufficient amount

errors.name: InsufficientDelegateApproval
errors.msg: Insufficient delegate approval - user must approve escrow PDA as delegate before wrap

errors.name: BalanceMismatch
errors.msg: Balance mismatch - actual transfer amount differs from expected (possible fee-on-transfer token)

types.name: Config
docs: Configuration account for the forwarder.
Mirrors EVM's ForwarderBase + EmergencyMigratableForwarderBase state:
- protocol_adapter: Only this address can call forward_call
- logic_ref: Only handle this resource type
- emergency_committee: Can set emergency_caller when PA stopped
- emergency_caller: Can call forward_emergency_call when PA stopped

fields.name: protocol_adapter
docs: The Protocol Adapter program ID that can call forward_call

fields.name: logic_ref
docs: The logic reference (verifying key) this forwarder handles

fields.name: emergency_committee
docs: Emergency committee that can set emergency_caller

fields.name: emergency_caller
docs: Emergency caller set by committee (zero = not set)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

types.name: EmergencyCallerSet
docs: Emitted when emergency caller is set by committee.
Mirrors EVM: `event EmergencyCallerSet(address caller);`

fields.name: emergency_caller
docs: The new emergency caller address

fields.name: set_by
docs: The committee that set this caller

types.name: EmergencyWithdraw
docs: Emitted when emergency withdrawal is performed.

fields.name: token_mint
docs: The SPL token mint that was withdrawn

fields.name: to
docs: The recipient who received the tokens

fields.name: amount
docs: The amount of tokens withdrawn

fields.name: caller
docs: The emergency caller who performed the withdrawal

types.name: Unwrapped
docs: Emitted when tokens are unwrapped (released from escrow).
Mirrors EVM: `event Unwrapped(address indexed token, address indexed to, uint128 amount);`

fields.name: token_mint
docs: The SPL token mint that was unwrapped

fields.name: to
docs: The recipient who received the tokens

fields.name: amount
docs: The amount of tokens unwrapped

types.name: Wrapped
docs: Emitted when tokens are wrapped (locked into escrow).
Mirrors EVM: `event Wrapped(address indexed token, address indexed from, uint128 amount);`

fields.name: token_mint
docs: The SPL token mint that was wrapped

fields.name: from
docs: The user who wrapped tokens (signed the authorization)

fields.name: amount
docs: The amount of tokens wrapped

fields.name: nonce
docs: The nonce used for replay protection

fields.name: action_tree_root
docs: The action tree root this wrap was bound to
